title: Interface Headsets How necessary are they
display_title: Interface Headsets How necessary are they
wikitext:
[]: Interface Headsets - How necessary are they?             Quote Post by jojojoker » Mon Nov 01, 2010 10:25 pm Just curious about them. We see in the NGE battle with Zeruel that Shinji is wearing them, naturally. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Nov 01, 2010 10:58 pm There's a similar discussion here , but actually I think that we were dumb enough to miss that he wasn't wearing them in NME (the thread was about Kaworu's missing headsets, and I simply mentioned EoE as an example of a pilot without them but it's controversial how much he was synchronized with the EVA, probably enough to receive the stigmata). It's one more proof that probably they're used only to monitor or at best to help the synchronization. Thank your for noticing that.

[]:             Quote Post by jojojoker » Mon Nov 01, 2010 11:08 pm Yeah, I read that thread. Just a while ago I was thinking about how God-mode Shinji didn't seem to be wearing them but I thought it was because he went all "spirit"-ish. Then just before I actually bothered to watch the scene again and saw he never had them on. Yeah, the monitoring theory works out but it still makes you wonder about the discrepancy here.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Nov 01, 2010 11:10 pm jojojoker wrote: Yeah, I read that thread. Just a while ago I was thinking about how God-mode Shinji didn't seem to be wearing them but I thought it was because he went all "spirit"-ish. Then just before I actually bothered to watch the scene again and saw he never had them on. Yeah, the monitoring theory works out but it still makes you wonder about the discrepancy here.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Nov 01, 2010 11:22 pm jojojoker wrote: Yeah, the monitoring theory works out but it still makes you wonder about the discrepancy here.
